summary: Completed frontend testing of 'Defesa Antimíssil' mode. All new features working correctly - new difficulty mode appears in dropdown, VS scoreboard with 'DEFESA ANTIMÍSSIL' label shows up, USA missile fires correctly, USSR responds with either interception or counter-attack after ~3 seconds, and 'Guerra Total' mode continues to work as expected.
passed_tests: Game canvas loads correctly
Defesa Antimíssil appears in difficulty dropdown (5 total options: Fácil, Médio, Difícil, Guerra Total, Defesa Antimíssil)
Defesa Antimíssil mode can be selected from dropdown
VS scoreboard shows USA vs CCCP when antimissil mode is selected
'DEFESA ANTIMÍSSIL' label appears under 'Primeiro a 5' in scoreboard header
Fire button works in antimissil mode - USA missile launches with blue trajectory
USSR responds after ~3 seconds in antimissil mode
USSR can respond with counter-attack (red trajectory with 'URSS Revidando!' toast)
USSR can respond with interception attempt (cyan dashed trajectory with 'URSS Interceptando!' toast)
Toast notification 'Lançamento Detectado! URSS avaliando resposta...' appears before USSR response
Guerra Total mode works correctly - USSR retaliates with counter-attack (not interception)
'First to 5' victory condition displayed ('Primeiro a 5') in both Guerra Total and Antimissil modes
Reset button works - clears all projectiles, explosions, and resets scores to 0
Reset button shows 'Missão reiniciada!' toast notification
Switching between all modes (easy, medium, hard, total, antimissil) works without errors
Angle slider works and updates missile direction (tested 45° to 90°)
Velocity slider is present and accessible
Sound toggle button works
USSR missile launcher tower visible in both Guerra Total and Antimissil modes
Explosion animations render correctly (mushroom cloud effect)
'PLACAR DA GUERRA' section visible in sidebar with EUA and URSS statistics
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Defesa Antimíssil' mode has been verified working. Key differences from 'Guerra Total' mode: In Antimissil mode, USSR has 55% chance to attempt interception (cyan dashed trajectory aimed at US missile) vs 45% chance of standard counter-attack. The interceptor missile attempts to collide with the US missile mid-air. All data-testid attributes are present: game-canvas, difficulty-select, fire-button, reset-button, angle-slider, velocity-slider, sound-toggle. The dropdown uses Shadcn Select component.
